== Notes for [[Item:Q106020|Q106020]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jayda_al-Sindhi

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ali_ibn_Husayn
--------------------
* Wilaadat (Birth):
* Wafaat (Death):

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ali_ibn_Husayn

Source 2: http://gift2shias.com/2010/05/03/children-of-aimma-by-tripolysunni/

Source 3: http://www.ghadeer.org/english/shia/shia/4thimam.html

Source 4: http://www.al-islam.org/story-of-the-holy-kaaba-and-its-people-shabbar/fourth-imam-ali-ibn-al-husayn-zainul-abedeen

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000014619304005

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
